svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="一天时间轴" id="timeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-575" dy="-122" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="一天里在跑的三个 Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="300" x="400" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#1e293b;strokeWidth=2;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="60" y="240" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1040" y="240" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0000" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="00:00" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="120" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0300" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="03:00" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="500" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t09" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="09:00 上班" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="830" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tnext" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=11;" value="次日 00:00" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="80" x="970" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dot1" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="14" width="14" x="143" y="233" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dot2" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0f766e;strokeColor=#0f766e;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="14" width="14" x="523" y="233" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nightly_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="夜间测试 Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="180" x="100" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nightly_detail" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="同步 dev → 8 步测试
失败 → claude 修 → 验证 → MR
耗时 40–60 min · 命中率 ~60%

⚠️ 可逆 + 客观验证 → 全自治" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="70" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="line1" edge="1" parent="1" source="nightly_box" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;" target="dot1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="review_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="定时评审 Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="430" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="review_detail" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="扫 feature 分支相对 dev 改动
数 🔴 阻断 → 飞书告警
只读, 不改代码

⚠️ 主观判断 → 只告警不自治" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="410" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="line2" edge="1" parent="1" source="review_box" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#0f766e;dashed=1;" target="dot2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backup_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="数据库备份 Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="690" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backup_detail" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="从只读从库 mysqldump
gzip + SHA256 → 跨云 OSS
3-2-1: 日7+周4+月12

⚠️ 不可逆 → 人确认, 失败必告警" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="680" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="line3" edge="1" parent="1" source="backup_box" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#0f766e;dashed=1;" target="dot2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="human" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;align=center;" value="白天: 人看昨晚的 Loop 结果 → review MR / 处理告警 → 手动发版(命令化骨架)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="700" x="200" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="principle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="机器兜夜间例行 + 人处理例外 — 两者互补, 不是替代" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="460" x="320" y="355" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
同步 dev → 8 步测试
失败 → claude 修 → 验证 → MR
耗时 40–60 min · 命中率 ~60%
⚠️ 可逆 + 客观验证 → 全自治

扫 feature 分支相对 dev 改动
数 🔴 阻断 → 飞书告警
只读, 不改代码
⚠️ 主观判断 → 只告警不自治
